headline: AI Chips Today - Transforming Power: Microchip's Silicon Carbide Modules Revolutionize Efficiency
summary: The recent launch of Microchip Technology's 3.3 kV HV‑D3 mSiC® Power Modules marks a significant development in the AI chips landscape, particularly for AI hyperscale data centers. These new silicon carbide modules are designed to facilitate the adoption of solid-state transformers (SSTs), which offer improved power efficiency and reduced conversion stages, enhancing the delivery of power directly from the medium-voltage grid to server racks. The innovation addresses limitations traditionally...

headline: The ‘Insatiable’ Logic Behind Micron’s ‘Extreme’ Gains
summary: Memory chips are the hottest play on artificial-intelligence hardware, and  Micron Technology  has been among the hottest stocks in the space.  It has company in SK Hynix, the South Korean memory-chip maker, whose shares have also surged.  Micron stock had an incredible day on Tuesday, when it surged 19% after UBS raised its price target on the stock to $1,625 from $535, arguing long-term supply agreements justified a higher price-to-earnings ratio for the company.

content.title: The ‘Insatiable’ Logic Behind Micron’s ‘Extreme’ Gains
content.summary: Memory chips are the hottest play on artificial-intelligence hardware, and  Micron Technology  has been among the hottest stocks in the space.  It has company in SK Hynix, the South Korean memory-chip maker, whose shares have also surged.  Micron stock had an incredible day on Tuesday, when it surged 19% after UBS raised its price target on the stock to $1,625 from $535, arguing long-term supply agreements justified a higher price-to-earnings ratio for the company.
